name: terminallyskill
description: TerminallySKILL prompt-aware command builder and workspace

scripts.package: npm run generate-icon && electron-vite build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.mjs --publish never && npm run generate-update-feeds
scripts.package:mac: npm run generate-icon && electron-vite build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.mjs --mac --x64 --publish never && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.mjs --mac --arm64 --publish never && npm run generate-update-feeds
scripts.package:mac:x64: npm run generate-icon && electron-vite build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.mjs --mac --x64 --publish never && npm run generate-update-feeds
scripts.package:mac:arm64: npm run generate-icon && electron-vite build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.mjs --mac --arm64 --publish never && npm run generate-update-feeds
scripts.package:linux: npm run generate-icon && electron-vite build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.mjs --linux --publish never && npm run generate-update-feeds
scripts.package:linux:x64: npm run generate-icon && electron-vite build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.mjs --linux --x64 --publish never && npm run generate-update-feeds
scripts.package:linux:arm64: npm run generate-icon && electron-vite build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.mjs --linux --arm64 --publish never && npm run generate-update-feeds
scripts.package:win: npm run generate-icon && electron-vite build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.mjs --win --publish never && npm run generate-update-feeds
scripts.package:win:x64: npm run generate-icon && electron-vite build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.mjs --win --x64 --publish never && npm run generate-update-feeds
scripts.package:win:arm64: npm run generate-icon && electron-vite build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.mjs --win --arm64 --publish never && npm run generate-update-feeds
scripts.package:all:cross: npm run package:mac:x64 && npm run package:mac:arm64 && npm run package:linux:x64 && npm run package:linux:arm64 && npm run package:win:x64 && npm run package:win:arm64
